title: Experiment To Me
content:
Experiment to me
    Is every one I meet.
    If it contain a kernel?
    The figure of a nut

    Presents upon a tree,
    Equally plausibly;
    But meat within is requisite,
    To squirrels and to me.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Experiment To Me"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
